_comment: Example data file for the LocalJSON plugin. Top level may be a list (as here), a {name: entry} map, or {"cards": [...]}. Each entry may use the friendly schema below or be a raw Scryfall card object (those are passed through untouched). Only 'name' is strictly required; everything else has sensible defaults.

cards.name: Lightning Bolt
cards.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
cards.flavor_text: The sparkmage shrieked, calling on the rage of the storms of his youth.

cards.name: Nissa's Pilgrimage
cards.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic Forest cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then shuffle.
cards.flavor_text: Where Nissa walks, the land remembers.

card_faces.name: Custom Transform Card
card_faces.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target.
